Definition: 30-minute period of the day when calls were offered. In 24-hour, Eastern Time. (EX: 13:00 is 1PM-1:30PM).
Percentage of calls answered within target. (EX: 20 second target, how many calls were answered in 20 seconds or less).
Total number of incoming calls (answered + abandoned).
Total number of callers who hung up before call was answered.
Percentage of total callers who hung up before call was answered.
Customer Care Time. Average time it takes an agent to handle each call. Includes Talk Time, Hold Time, and time notating & actioning account after the call.
Total number of Full Time Agents scheduled daily for each servicing group.
